ArgumentListWrapping:CredentialManagerService.kt$CredentialManagerService$("Google OAuth not configured. Please:
1. Go to Google Cloud Console
2. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID for Web application
3. Add the Client ID to default_web_client_id in strings.xml
4. Enable Google Calendar API")

LongParameterList:SyncService.kt$SyncService$( private val eventDao: EventDao, private val childInfoDao: ChildInfoDao, private val userDao: UserDao, private val firestoreEventDataSource: FirestoreEventDataSource, private val firestoreChildInfoDataSource: FirestoreChildInfoDataSource, private val firestoreUserDataSource: FirestoreUserDataSource, private val firebaseAuthService: FirebaseAuthService, private val fcmService: FcmService, private val conflictResolver: ConflictResolver )
MaxLineLength:CalendarSyncRepository.kt$CalendarSyncRepository$emit(SyncResult.Error("Network error: ${e.message ?: "Unable to connect to Google Calendar. Please check your internet connection."}"))
MaxLineLength:CalendarSyncRepository.kt$CalendarSyncRepository$emit(SyncResult.Error("Synchronization error: Network operation cannot run on main thread. Please try again."))

MaxLineLength:CredentialManagerService.kt$CredentialManagerService$throw IllegalStateException("Google OAuth not configured. Please:
1. Go to Google Cloud Console
2. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID for Web application
3. Add the Client ID to default_web_client_id in strings.xml
4. Enable Google Calendar API")

MaxLineLength:CredentialManagerService.kt$CredentialManagerService$throw IllegalStateException("Web Client ID not configured. Please set up OAuth 2.0 Client ID in Google Cloud Console and update default_web_client_id in strings.xml")
MaxLineLength:CustodySetupViewModel.kt$CustodySetupUiState$"$whoFirst gets Mon-Tue, ${if (momFirst) "Dad" else "Mom"} gets Wed-Thu, then alternates for Fri-Sun."
MaxLineLength:CustodySetupViewModel.kt$CustodySetupUiState$"$whoFirst gets Mon-Wed (3 days), ${if (momFirst) "Dad" else "Mom"} gets Thu-Sun (4 days), then reverses."
MaxLineLength:CzechHolidays.kt$CzechHolidays$Holiday(LocalDate.of(year, 10, 28), "Independent Czechoslovak State Day", "Den vzniku samostatného československého státu")

MaxLineLength:DatabaseMigrations.kt$DatabaseMigrations.<no name provided>$"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_events_parentOwner_startDateTime ON events(parentOwner, startDateTime)"
MaxLineLength:DayWeekView.kt$contentDescription = "Time slot at ${String.format("%02d:00", hour)} on ${date.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM dd"))}. Tap to add event."
MaxLineLength:EncryptedPreferences.kt$EncryptedPreferences$Log.e("EncryptedPreferences", "Critical: Failed to create any SharedPreferences, using in-memory fallback", e2)

MaxLineLength:MessageTemplate.kt$DefaultMessageTemplates$content = "[Ребенок] сегодня был у врача по поводу [жалоба]. Диагноз: [диагноз]. Нужно [рекомендации врача]."
MaxLineLength:MessageTemplate.kt$DefaultMessageTemplates$content = "Привет! Я немного задержусь с передачей [ребенка]. Буду через [время] минут. Извини за неудобство!"

MaxLineLength:PairingScreen.kt$text = "Share this QR code with your co-parent. They can scan it to accept your invitation."

MaxLineLength:PairingViewModel.kt$PairingViewModel$"Firestore API is not enabled. Please enable it in Google Cloud Console:\nhttps://console.developers.google.com/apis/api/firestore.googleapis.com/overview?project=coparently-a39c9"

MaxLineLength:PairingViewModel.kt$PairingViewModel$"No internet connection or DNS error. Please check your internet connection and try again."

MaxLineLength:PairingViewModel.kt$PairingViewModel$"Permission denied. Please check Firestore security rules:
https://console.firebase.google.com/project/coparently-a39c9/firestore/rules

Make sure rules are deployed and allow authenticated users to read/write their data."

MaxLineLength:SyncViewModel.kt$SyncViewModel$val successState = GoogleCalendarSyncState.Success("Signed in successfully as ${account.displayName ?: account.email}")

MemberNameEqualsClassName:EncryptedPreferences.kt$EncryptedPreferences$private val encryptedPreferences: SharedPreferences = try { if (masterKey != null) { try { EncryptedSharedPreferences.create( context, "encrypted_prefs", masterKey, EncryptedSharedPreferences.PrefKeyEncryptionScheme.AES256_SIV, EncryptedSharedPreferences.PrefValueEncryptionScheme.AES256_GCM ) } catch (e: Exception) { Log.e("EncryptedPreferences", "Failed to create EncryptedSharedPreferences, trying to delete corrupted file", e) // Try to delete the corrupted encrypted file and fall back try { context.deleteFile("encrypted_prefs.xml") context.deleteFile("encrypted_prefs.xml.bak") } catch (deleteEx: Exception) { Log.w("EncryptedPreferences", "Could not delete corrupted encrypted file", deleteEx) } // Fallback to regular SharedPreferences Log.w("EncryptedPreferences", "Using regular SharedPreferences as fallback") context.getSharedPreferences("encrypted_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE) } } else { // Fallback to regular SharedPreferences if encryption fails Log.w("EncryptedPreferences", "Using regular SharedPreferences as fallback (no master key)") context.getSharedPreferences("encrypted_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE) } } catch (e: Exception) { Log.e("EncryptedPreferences", "Failed to create SharedPreferences, using application context", e) // Last resort: use application context try { context.applicationContext.getSharedPreferences("encrypted_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE) } catch (e2: Exception) { Log.e("EncryptedPreferences", "Critical: Failed to create any SharedPreferences, using in-memory fallback", e2) // Ultimate fallback: use in-memory SharedPreferences // This will lose data on app restart but prevents crash context.getSharedPreferences("encrypted_prefs_memory", Context.MODE_PRIVATE) } }
